title: BlobRange
description: PROXY-CODEC range-serve conformance descriptor (PROXY_CODEC_SPEC §JuiceMount ratification §3 / correction #2). NOT a control-plane JSON body — the blob endpoint streams raw blob bytes. This fixture is a machine-readable description of the EXPECTED HTTP STATUS + RESPONSE HEADERS for a Range request and an unranged GET against the proxy-blob HTTP endpoint (GET /blob?inode=N&kind=proxy). The provider's conformance test asserts these header contracts directly (bridge/contract_conformance_test.go); the consumer's player relies on them for progressive HTTP + seek (without 206/Accept-Ranges every player buffers the whole file before playback). The contract is codec-independent: faststart + byte-range serving is identical for h264/hevc/av1.

ranged.description: The response to GET with Range: bytes=0-1 — the spec's named conformance case.

Content-Range.description: bytes 0-1/<total blob size>. The total is the actual proxy.mp4 size (== blob_size).

unranged.description: The response to a plain GET (no Range header).

Accept-Ranges.description: Advertised so a client knows it may issue Range requests.

Content-Length.description: Full blob size in bytes (== blob_size).
